html:
Exclusive to:  

“Wearer's wetness will rapidly rises up to 50%. Slows the wearer by 10%.”

-

The Ice Cube is a craftable Dress Item found in the Clothing Filter and Summer Items Filter. It requires 2 Ropes and 10 Ice to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.

When worn, the Ice Cube grants 240 points of protection from Overheating, and provides a cooling effect of 40°. Additionally, the player's Wetness will increase rapidly up to a maximum of 50 and walking speed will be reduced by 10%. The Ice Cube does not have durability, instead melting after 8 days, similar to the Ham Bat and Garland. That being said, it can be replenished with Ice, adding each time additional 2 days of durability.

Tips

  • Placing an Ice Cube in the Ice Box will completely stop it from melting.
  • The Ice Cube is good addition to the Thermal Stone near the Endothermic Fire Pit and/or in the Ice Box for long trips during Summer.
  • The Ice Cube will make inventory and equipped items Wet, causing Sanity loss. This can be used to become insane for farming Nightmare Fuel.
  • Even with maximum wetness, Maxwell will not lose any sanity, making this hat rather valuable for him during summer. That being said, the faster food spoilage and slippery weapons are still large downsides to using the Ice Cube for extended periods of time.
  • Dress Items with Wetness resistance, such as the Rain Coat, do not reduce wetness from the Ice Cube.
  • While wearing the Ice Cube, being near a fire will slowly get rid of player wetness and will prevent the player and the player's items from becoming wet.
  • Storing important items in the Piggyback will prevent them from becoming wet.
  • Wurt does not lose sanity from the Ice Cube's Wetness.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Loyal Jawesome Ice Cube skin was originally awarded for playing Don't Starve Together during the official Winter's Feast events in 2025.
  • The Loyal Pengull Ice Cube skin was originally awarded for playing Don't Starve Together after 1st May with 725977 update.
Loyal
Shelled Collection
Jawesome Ice Cube
You'll be so cool with this chiselled jaw.
Loyal
Pengull Ice Cube
The most dignified way to cool down.

Trivia

  • The description "Science, on the rocks." refers to the bartending terminology "On the rocks" for a drink served over ice cubes.

“Stay cool, boy.”
–Wilson
“It's a real damper on my mood.”
–Willow
“Why put big ice on head?”
–Wolfgang
“Keep a cool head.”
–Wendy
“HAT SEEMS DANGEROUS TO MY FUNCTION”
–WX-78
“A perfect cube of ice.”
–Wickerbottom
“I could chop it if I had to.”
–Woodie
“Strap some ice to your head.”
–Maxwell
“Freezes the brain and lowers my internal body temperature.”
–Wagstaff
“A chunk öf cöld.”
–Wigfrid
“This should keep us cool.”
–Webber
“Keeps my head cold. And wet.”
–Walani
“Must I wear it?”
–Warly
“Keeps me 'ead cool.”
–Woodlegs
“WILBA HATH COLD BRAINS”
–Wilba
“Cool hat!”
–Wormwood
“Quite frankly, I don't care who sees me like this.”
–Wheeler
“There must be a more practical solution.”
–Winona
“Horns on ice!”
–Wortox
“This a very good hat.”
–Wurt
“There's got to be a better way to stay cool...”
–Walter
“Simple and effective.”
–Wanda

The Ice Cube is a craftable Dress Item found in the Clothing Filter and Summer Items Filter. It requires 2 Ropes and 10 Ice to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.
When worn, the Ice Cube grants 240 points of protection from Overheating, and provides a cooling effect of 40°. Additionally, the player's Wetness will increase rapidly up to a maximum of 50 and walking speed will be reduced by 10%. The Ice Cube does not have durability, instead melting after 8 days, similar to the Ham Bat and Garland. That being said, it can be replenished with Ice, adding each time additional 2 days of durability.
Tips[edit | edit source]
Placing an Ice Cube in the Ice Box will completely stop it from melting.
The Ice Cube is good addition to the Thermal Stone near the Endothermic Fire Pit and/or in the Ice Box for long trips during Summer.
The Ice Cube will make inventory and equipped items Wet, causing Sanity loss. This can be used to become insane for farming Nightmare Fuel.
Even with maximum wetness, Maxwell will not lose any sanity, making this hat rather valuable for him during summer. That being said, the faster food spoilage and slippery weapons are still large downsides to using the Ice Cube for extended periods of time.
Dress Items with Wetness resistance, such as the Rain Coat, do not reduce wetness from the Ice Cube.
While wearing the Ice Cube, being near a fire will slowly get rid of player wetness and will prevent the player and the player's items from becoming wet.
Storing important items in the Piggyback will prevent them from becoming wet.
Wurt does not lose sanity from the Ice Cube's Wetness.
Skins[edit | edit source]

The Loyal Pengull Ice Cube skin was originally awarded for playing Don't Starve Together after 1st May with 725977 update.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Ice Cube là một Vật phẩm Trang phục có thể chế tạo được tìm thấy trong Bộ lọc Quần áo và Bộ lọc Vật phẩm Mùa hè. Nó cần 2 Dây Thừng và 10 Băng để chế tạo và cần Máy Luyện Kim để tạo nguyên mẫu.

It requires 2 [[Rope]]s and 10 [[Ice]] to craft and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. When worn, the Ice Cube grants 240 points of protection from [[Overheating]], and provides a cooling effect of 40°. Additionally, the player's [[Wetness]] will increase rapidly up to a maximum of 50 and walking speed will be reduced by 10%. The Ice Cube does not have durability, instead melting after 8 days, similar to the [[Ham Bat]] and [[Garland]]. That being said, it can be replenished with [[Ice]], adding each time additional 2 days of durability. == {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips == * Placing an Ice Cube in the [[Ice Box]] will completely stop it from melting. * The Ice Cube is good addition to the [[Thermal Stone]] near the [[Endothermic Fire Pit]] and/or in the Ice Box for long trips during [[Seasons/Summer|Summer]]. * The Ice Cube will make inventory and equipped items [[Wetness|Wet]], causing [[Sanity]] loss. This can be used to become insane for farming [[Nightmare Fuel]]. * Even with maximum wetness, [[Maxwell/Character|Maxwell]] will not lose ''any'' sanity, making this hat rather valuable for him during summer. That being said, the faster food spoilage and slippery weapons are still large downsides to using the Ice Cube for extended periods of time. * [[Dress]] Items with Wetness resistance, such as the [[Rain Coat]], do not reduce wetness from the Ice Cube. * While wearing the Ice Cube, being near a fire will slowly get rid of player wetness and will prevent the player and the player's items from becoming wet. * Storing important items in the [[Piggyback]] will prevent them from becoming wet. * Wurt does not lose sanity from the Ice Cube's Wetness. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Head items|Belongings}} * The {{SkinRarity|Loyal}} '''Jawesome Ice Cube''' skin was originally awarded for playing ''Don't Starve Together'' during the official [[Winter's Feast]] events in 2025. * The {{SkinRarity|Loyal}} '''Pengull Ice Cube''' skin was originally awarded for playing ''Don't Starve Together'' after 1st May with 725977 update.
